title: Bangalore Heat Wave
lead: Bangalore is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.54. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bangalore are characterized by high temperatures and low humidity, with an umidita of 46% and vento of 8.9 km/h.
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 11.4 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
 The city's heat wave is expected to continue, posing a significant threat to the health and well-being of its residents.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the critical heat wave in Bangalore.
